doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_mul_d (mpfr/src/mul_d.c L25-L50). Multiply MPFR `b` by machine double `c`, rounded to `prec` bits under `rnd`. The C reference is a trivial wrapper: stack-allocate an mpfr_t at prec=53, mpfr_set_d (exact), then delegate to mpfr_mul. The TS port mirrors: convert c -> MPFR at prec=53, then mpfr_mul(b, dMpfr, prec, rnd). Class 'misc'; O(1) modulo mpfr_mul cost.
c_signature: int mpfr_mul_d(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, double c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: C mutates `a`; TS returns Result. c is bare JS number. NaN/Inf/+/-0 doubles propagate through mpfr_set_d -> mpfr_mul: NaN x anything = NaN; +/-Inf x +/-0 = NaN; +/-Inf x finite-nonzero = +/-Inf (sign product); 0 x 0 = 0 (sign product). Sign of normal x normal product = b.sign * c_sign (the product-of-signs rule, mpfr/src/mul.c). The MPFR_SAVE_EXPO / mpfr_check_range pattern is dropped -- TS has no global emax/emin state.
refs: mpfr/src/mul_d.c L25-L50 -- the C reference body.
src/ops/set_d.ts -- load-bearing for the double->MPFR step.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: Signed zero is real' -- sign of product is product-of-signs.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: Ternary flag is the sign of (rounded - exact)'.
